slides.title: Your joints stay young by *staying in motion*.
slides.sub: Cartilage has no blood supply of its own. Movement is how it feeds and protects itself.

slides.title: Cartilage has no blood supply
slides.body: The cushion between your bones gets no direct circulation. It depends entirely on *the fluid around it* for nutrients.

slides.title: Motion is the pump
slides.body: Each step and bend pushes synovial fluid in and out of the cartilage, *delivering nutrients* and clearing waste like a sponge.

slides.title: Stillness starves the joint
slides.body: Long hours of sitting slow that exchange. Cartilage that rarely moves can *thin and stiffen* over the years.

slides.title: Load it gently, often
slides.body: Walking, squatting and stairs lubricate the joint. Regular loaded movement *is linked to* less pain and better mobility with age.

slides.title: A little, most days
slides.body: Joints are built to last decades when used. Consistent daily movement *can support* pain-free knees and hips for life.

slides.title: Keep your joints *moving for decades*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your steps, movement and daily activity, then turns it into one Health Score so motion becomes a habit.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your joints don't wear out from use. They wear out from sitting still. 🌿

Cartilage has no blood supply, so it feeds only on the fluid that movement pumps through it. Walk, squat and take the stairs, and your knees and hips can stay pain-free for decades. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns daily movement into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Movement Keeps Your Joints Pain-Free for Decades
